name: green-goods

scripts.agentic:check: bun run check:design-md && bun run check:design-generated && bun run check:design-tokens && bun run --filter @green-goods/shared check:stories && bun run --filter @green-goods/shared check:story-quality
scripts.check:design-md: design.md lint --format json DESIGN.md && design.md lint --format json packages/admin/DESIGN.md && design.md lint --format json packages/client/DESIGN.pwa.md && design.md lint --format json packages/client/DESIGN.browser.md && design.md lint --format json docs/DESIGN.md
scripts.lint: bun --bun run oxlint packages/client/src packages/admin/src packages/shared/src packages/indexer/src packages/agent/src packages/contracts/script && cd packages/contracts && bun run lint
scripts.lint:check: bun --bun run oxlint packages/client/src packages/admin/src packages/shared/src packages/indexer/src packages/agent/src packages/contracts/script && cd packages/contracts && bun run lint:check
scripts.lighthouse: bun run lighthouse:client && bun run lighthouse:admin
scripts.browser-proof:routes: bun run build:client && bun run build:admin && bun run build:docs && bun scripts/agentic-browser-proof.mjs
scripts.lighthouse:client: bun run build:client && cd packages/client && npx lhci autorun
scripts.lighthouse:admin: bun run build:admin && cd packages/admin && npx lhci autorun
scripts.lighthouse:collect: bun run build:client && cd packages/client && npx lhci collect
scripts.build: bun run build:contracts && bun run build:shared && bun run build:indexer && bun run build:client && bun run build:admin
scripts.contracts:upgrade:dry:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run upgrade:dry:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:upgrade:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run upgrade:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:upgrade:action-registry:arbitr: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run upgrade:action-registry:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:repair:octant-assets:dry:arbit: APP_ENV=development sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run repair:octant-assets:dry:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:repair:octant-assets:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run repair:octant-assets:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:migrate:vaults:dry:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run migrate:vaults:dry:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:migrate:vaults:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run migrate:vaults:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:marketplace:status:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer MARKETPLACE_EXPECTED_OWNER=0xFBAf2A9734eAe75497e1695706CC45ddfA346ad6 sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run marketplace:status:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:marketplace:configure:dry:arbi: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer MARKETPLACE_EXPECTED_OWNER=0xFBAf2A9734eAe75497e1695706CC45ddfA346ad6 sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run marketplace:configure:dry:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:marketplace:configure:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer MARKETPLACE_EXPECTED_OWNER=0xFBAf2A9734eAe75497e1695706CC45ddfA346ad6 sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run marketplace:configure:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:verify:post-deploy:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer MARKETPLACE_EXPECTED_OWNER=0xFBAf2A9734eAe75497e1695706CC45ddfA346ad6 sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run verify:post-deploy:arbitrum'
scripts.contracts:ens:deploy:mainnet: APP_ENV=development bun --cwd packages/contracts script/upgrade-ens-receiver.ts deploy-mainnet --network mainnet
scripts.contracts:ens:deploy:mainnet:broadcast: APP_ENV=development bun --cwd packages/contracts script/upgrade-ens-receiver.ts deploy-mainnet --network mainnet --broadcast
scripts.contracts:ens:update:l1-receiver: APP_ENV=development bun --cwd packages/contracts script/upgrade-ens-receiver.ts update-l1-receiver --network arbitrum
scripts.contracts:ens:sponsor:status:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development bun --cwd packages/contracts script/ens-sponsor.ts status --network arbitrum
scripts.contracts:ens:sponsor:monitor:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development bun --cwd packages/contracts script/ens-sponsor.ts monitor --network arbitrum
scripts.contracts:ens:sponsor:top-up:arbitrum: APP_ENV=development bun --cwd packages/contracts script/ens-sponsor.ts top-up --network arbitrum --broadcast
scripts.contracts:migrate:action-instructions:v2: APP_ENV=development FOUNDRY_KEYSTORE_ACCOUNT=green-goods-deployer sh -lc 'cd packages/contracts && bun run migrate:action-instructions:v2:arbitrum'

*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json}: bash -c 'files="$@"; filtered=$(echo "$files" | tr " " "\n" | grep -Ev "packages/contracts/(\\.generated|out)/"); [ -n "$filtered" ] && echo "$filtered" | xargs bunx @biomejs/biome format --write || true' --

description: A progressive web application for the Green Goods protocol.
